refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive, record, and manage performance requirements (cycle time, energy efficiency, availability) based on worksite mission context inputs.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed to explicitly state the three key functions: derivation, recording, and management of performance requirements, ensuring clarity and traceability to worksite context.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets derived from mission context inputs, with recorded history of baselines and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record performance requirements and baseline/calibration history
Manage updates and traceability of performance requirements

candidate_dps: Algorithmic model to analyze mission context and derive performance targets
Database schema and storage system for recording requirements and history
Management interface and control logic for updates and traceability
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software framework combining derivation algorithms, database recording, and management interface

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation algorithms and database schema
Management interface depends on both derivation and recording modules
coupling_check.notes: The integrated framework is designed with modular interfaces to minimize coupling and allow independent updates.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate and timely worksite mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if recording and management modules are not synchronized
High safety criticality requires robust validation of derived performance requirements
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing derivation, recording, and management functions further if coupling impacts maintainability.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software framework module responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context data for performance requirement derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to other system modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and updates with external systems

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary module for performance requirement functions; high containment and low diffusion
Vehicle module has minimal direct involvement; would cause high diffusion if assigned here
Not relevant for performance requirement derivation; assignment here would increase diffusion
Safety Services may consume performance data but not responsible for derivation or management

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning to NGHE Solution centralizes performance requirement logic and data, minimizing diffusion and maximizing containment.
containment_risks: Potential complexity within NGHE Solution module if all functions are tightly integrated
Interface dependencies on Telemetry and Network Link must be robust to avoid data loss
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity and consider sub-module decomposition within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR sub-functions with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized assignment in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: High containment score for NGHE Solution supports architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented performance targets and traceability records within NGHE Solution.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR to DP and IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Consider further modularization within NGHE Solution to manage complexity.
Ensure robust interface definitions for Telemetry and Network Link.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, further refinement of sub-FRs and potential modularization within NGHE Solution is advisable to reduce complexity and improve maintainability.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record performance requirements and baseline/calibration history
Manage updates and traceability of performance requirements

revise.why: To further decompose sub-FRs into atomic elements for clearer DP and IM mapping.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can handle integrated functions without excessive complexity
open_risks: Data synchronization issues between derivation and recording functions
Potential for module complexity to impact maintainability
evidence_needed: Demonstration of data flow and synchronization within NGHE Solution
Verification of performance requirement traceability and update management
